description: Architect child: semantic understanding, structural analysis, library doc verification, interface appendix, return exploration summary

steps.title: Semantic understanding
steps.description: Query codebase-retrieval for component interactions, call chains, data flows, test coverage, and downstream consumers relevant to {{task_id}}. Hard gate: must call codebase-retrieval at least once.

steps.title: Structural analysis
steps.description: Read implementation details of key files (up to 5) and search for all references to components that will be modified for {{task_id}}.

steps.title: Library documentation verification
steps.description: If external dependencies are involved in {{task_id}}, resolve library IDs and query docs via Context7 to verify API assumptions. Skip if purely internal.

steps.title: Produce interface appendix
steps.description: Produce Interface Appendix for {{task_id}}: catalog every cross-boundary identifier (SDK methods, columns, API params, event names) with exact value, source, and citation. Omit only if purely internal with no external interfaces.

steps.title: Return exploration summary
steps.description: Return structured exploration summary for {{task_id}}: architecture map, code patterns, test coverage, impact analysis, constraints, interface appendix, runtime attestation.
